rationale: Spec updated Comment field type to 'any'; driver had 'string' on some structs, requiring conformance fix.
Performance optimization: avoid preemptive ObjectID generation on insert. No spec rule involved.
Removing vestigial Go import path comments; pure internal code cleanup with no behavior change.
SCRAM authenticator leaks password in error message; no spec rule defines error message content format.

Documentation-only fix: updates uint encoding docs to accurately reflect existing behavior; no code change.
Internal refactor replacing bsoncore.DocumentSequence with iterator pattern; no user-visible behavior change.
Merging gridfs package into mongo package for API ergonomics; internal restructuring with no spec deviation.
Removing error return values from bson.Encoder/Decoder constructor APIs; pure API ergonomics improvement.
Removes redundant if-branch in decimal.go; trivial internal code cleanup with no behavior change.
Empty slice now decodes as empty slice instead of nil; behavioral regression from prior release, but BSON spec does not mandate nil vs. empty semantics.
UNIX socket URLs regressed due to URL parsing change; implementation bug, no specific connection-string spec rule for percent-encoded hostnames cited.
Improving deprecation notice copy to reference BSONOptions replacement; documentation-only change.
Release tooling bug: gdrel uses stale local repo; build/release infrastructure issue.
Adding go.work file for Go workspaces support; developer tooling change with no driver behavior impact.
Centralizing x-package Connection interface as struct for Go idiom compliance; internal architectural refactor.
Adding new bson.RawArray type to improve array lookup API ergonomics; feature addition not driven by spec gap.
Issue split Improvement from DRIVERS-2861 tracking SERVER-85756 rename rangePreview to range; proactive spec/server tracking.
CSOT spec requires operation-level timeouts to be applied as maxTimeMS; driver was omitting it due to context-wrapping oversight.
Performance fix: avoid calling RTTMonitor.Stats on every operation; internal perf optimization, no spec rule involved.
Retryable reads/writes spec excludes context cancel/timeout errors from retry eligibility; driver was retrying them incorrectly.
Removing bsoncore package dependencies on primitive/bsonrw to prevent import cycles; internal refactor.
Merging bsontype package into bson package to eliminate unnecessary separation; internal restructuring.
Merging primitive package into bson package to improve usability; internal restructuring with no spec deviation.
Makefile missing golint/errcheck tools; build/developer tooling issue.

Evergreen CI license linter not flagging files missing Apache 2.0 header; CI/build tooling issue.
Performance improvement for DateTime and ObjectID JSON serialization; no spec behavior involved.

RTTMonitor goroutine/connection leak on client disconnect; resource leak, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Converting sealed Session interface to struct for Go best-practice compliance; API ergonomics refactor.
Feature request: expose RemainingBatchLength on ChangeStream to match Cursor API; no spec requirement cited.
Adding bold documentation warnings that x/ packages are experimental; documentation-only change.
CSFLE spec requires passing FLE encryption data to IndexView operations; driver was not doing so for Create/List/Drop.
BSON decoding into interface fields holding concrete slice types fails; implementation-level decoding bug, no specific BSON spec rule contradicted.

Making description package internal and splitting event types; pure internal restructuring with no spec deviation.
DistinctResult not using Collection's BSONOptions; internal API consistency gap, not a spec-defined requirement violation.
Removing vestigial Go import path comments from BSON packages; pure internal code cleanup.
Adding MarshalJSON/UnmarshalJSON to bson.D for stdlib JSON interop; feature addition not driven by spec requirement.
Workaround allowing manual maxTimeMS on Find/Aggregate while CSOT timeoutMode support is pending; transitional API improvement.
Replacing internal test helper AssertSoon with assert.Eventually; internal test infrastructure refactor.
Removing external stats package dependency from Go driver; build/dependency cleanup with no behavior change.
OCSP spec requires soft-fail when responders unreachable; driver returned errors on context cancel/timeout, violating spec.
Logic cleanup PR tracking ticket; internal code maintenance with no behavior change.
Changing bson.D/bson.M default String() to extended JSON for v2.0; deliberate API improvement, not a spec violation.
Removing EncodeContext/DecodeContext from bson.Encoder/Decoder configuration API; API simplification refactor for v2.0.
Replacing driver-specific Type with byte in ValueMarshaler/ValueUnmarshaler interfaces; API ergonomics improvement.
Deprecating bson.DefaultRegistry global mutable variable; API housekeeping, no spec rule involved.
Replacing manual bit-shifting with encoding/binary in wiremessage and bsoncore; internal code clarity refactor.
